description_long: This is a medium-to-large dog with a robust, elongated body and a deep chest, covered in a rich, dark brown coat with subtle lighter streaks. The head is broad with a pronounced snout and a gentle slope from the forehead to the nose, giving it a friendly and approachable expression. The ears are long, floppy, and hang down the sides of the head, typical of retriever or spaniel breeds. Its legs are sturdy and well-muscled, supporting a slightly low-slung body, and the paws are large and rounded. The tail is thick at the base, tapering to a point, and is held straight out behind the body. The surface appears to be soft and matte, resembling the texture of short, dense fur.
description: A robust, dark brown dog with a long body, floppy ears, and a straight tail, covered in short, dense fur.
description_view_0: Side view showing the dog's elongated body, floppy ears, and straight tail held out behind.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the broad hindquarters, straight tail, and symmetry of the back legs.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same elongated body and floppy ears, with the tail visible in profile.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the broad head, long floppy ears, and sturdy front legs.
